RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_base module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_base.AnimalBase(args: AnimalBaseInitArgsTypedDict)

Bases: object

calc_base_manure()

Calculates the values needed for animal class manure calculations.

Returns:

p_urine: amount of P required for urine production (g) p_feces_excrt: amount of P excreted by an animal (g)

config = {}
daily_p_update()

Calculates this animal’s daily phosphorus update.

nutrients = None
static set_config(config)
set_default_nutrient_rqmts()

Sets the default nutrient requirement values to be 0.

static set_nutrient_list(nutrients)
set_p_intake(p_intake, p_conc_ration)

Sets this animal’s phosphorus intake.

Args:

p_intake: the phosphorus intake p_conc_ration: the concentration of P in the ration

set_p_purchased()

Sets this animal’s phosphorus value as a purchased animal.

set_ration(ration, DMI)

Sets this animal’s ration formulation.

Args:

ration: dictionary representing the calculated ration DMI: the dry matter intake from @ration

update_body_weight_history(sim_day)

Updates the animal’s body weight history by appending a BodyWeightHistory object to the list.

Args:

sim_day: simulation day

update_pen_history(curr_pen, curr_day, classes_in_pen)

Updates the animal’s pen history by either appending to the existing history if the animal is in a different pen than it was the last time this method is called or modifying the last element in the pen_history list to reflect the current simulation day.

Args:

curr_pen: the pen that the animal is currently in curr_day: the current simulation day classes_in_pen: the classes in the animal’s current pen

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_constants module

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_events module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_events.AnimalEvents

Bases: object

A class to represent animal events in a farm simulation.

This class tracks the events related to animals including birth and other significant occurrences.

Attributes

eventsdict[int, list[str]]

A dictionary containing the events indexed by the animal’s age in days. The values are lists of descriptions for the events on that day.

add_event(animal_age: int, simulation_day: int, description: str) → None

Add a cow life event

Args:

animal_age: the date counter for the cow (from birth) simulation_day: day in the simulation description: the event happened on that day

get_most_recent_date(event_description: str) → int

Returns the most recent age at which the event_description happened

event_description: the event to be searched

the most recent age at which event_description happened,

-1 if not found.

init_from_string(events_str: str) → None

Initialize event from a string

Args:

events_str: string representation of events

Generates an id

get_cows(num, breed)

get_heiferIs(num, breed)
get_replacement_cows(num, breed)
init_animals(breed, animal_num=20000, sim_days=5000)

Returns: a dictionary which stores the summary of the initialization database

next_id()
class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.animal_initialization.AnimalValues(value)

Bases: IntEnum

An enumeration.

abortion_day = 20
ai_day = 19
birth_date = 2
birth_weight = 4
body_weight = 5
breed = 1
calf_birth_weight = 24
calving_interval = 30
conception_rate = 18
days_born = 3
days_in_milk = 28
days_in_preg = 21
estrus_count = 12
estrus_day = 13
events = 8
gestation_length = 22
id = 0
mature_body_weight = 7
p_gest_for_calf = 23
parity = 29
presynch_method = 25
repro_program = 9
resynch_method = 27
synch_ed_estrus_day = 16
synch_ed_method_h = 11
synch_ed_program_start_day_h = 15
synch_ed_stop_day = 17
tai_method_c = 26
tai_method_h = 10
tai_program_start_day_h = 14
wean_weight = 6

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.body_weight_history module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.body_weight_history.BodyWeightHistory(sim_day: int, days_born: int, body_weight: float)

Bases: object

A class to represent the history of body weight for an individual animal on a farm.

This class is used to track the body weight of an animal over the course of a simulation. It contains information about the simulation day, the age of the animal in days, and its body weight.

Attributes

simulation_dayint

The day of the simulation corresponding to the body weight record of the animal.

days_bornint

The number of days since the birth of the animal.

body_weightfloat

The body weight of the animal on the simulation day.

Methods

None.

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.calf module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.calf.Calf(args)

Bases: AnimalBase

assign_calf_values(args)

Assign calf with given values

calc_manure_excretion(feed: Dict[str, float], methane_model: str) → None

feed: Dict[str, float]

instance of the Feed class

methane_modelstr

None

Calculates this calf’s nutrient requirements.

feed: Dict[str, float]

instance of the Feed class

tempfloat

methane model used for methane emission calculations

Returns

None

get_calf_values()

Get current information from the calf

init_values(args)

Determine stillbirth, gender, and birth weight

phosphorus_rqmts(DMI)

Calculates and sets the animal’s phosphorus requirement.

Args:

DMI: the Dry Matter Intake (kg)

update(sim_day)

Controls calf’s grow with average daily gain based on user’s input until wean day. Calculate the wean weight at wean day. Here is the place to change growth rate with calf feeding methods later when we have calf nutrition from the ration formulation module.

Returns: time when calf is weaned – stop be fed with milk

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.calf.random() → x in the interval [0, 1).

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.cow module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.cow.Cow(args)

Bases: HeiferIII

CoSynch72_update(sim_day)

CoSynch72 protocol for tai method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

OvSynch48_update(sim_day)

OvSynch48 protocol for tai method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

OvSynch56_update(sim_day)

OvSynch56 protocol for tai method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

adjust_conception()

Adjust conception rate based on the parity of the cow

after_abortion_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after abortion at preg check

after_ai_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after AI.

calc_daily_walking_dist(vertical_dist_to_parlor, horizontal_dist_to_parlor)

Calculates and sets the animal’s daily vertical and horizontal walking distance (DVD and DHD). Args:

vertical_dist_to_parlor: vertical distance to milking parlor, km horizontal_dist_to_parlor: horizontal distance to milking parlor, km

calc_manure_excretion(feed, methane_model, methane_mitigation_method, methane_mitigation_additive_amount, ME_intake)

Calculates and sets the manure excretion components. Args:

feed: instance of the Feed class methane_model: methane model used for methane emission calculations ME_intake: metabolizable energy intake, Mcal/kg DM

calculate_daily_milk_produced() → float

Returns a float calculation of the milk produced based on a cow’s lactation curve parameters

calculate_fat_percent(days_in_milk: int)

Calculates fat percent of milk.

Note that this equation produces 0.0 if days_in_milk is set to one, so we’ve implemented a minimum days_in_milk value of 2.

Parameters

days_in_milkint

Number of days in milk.

cull_update(sim_day)

Update culling time and cull reasons for cow to leave the herd The reasons are reproduction failure, low production, and health issues Returns: not culled

d5CoSynch_update(sim_day)

5dCoSynch protocol for tai method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

death_update()
determine_estrus_day(start_date, estrus_note, avg, std, sim_day)

In estrus detection program, determine estrus day and estrus note.

Args:
start_date: start day of a estrus cycle, 1st day when breeding start

after calving or last estrus happened or return estrus from preg loss

estrus_note: note of this estrus avg: average length for an estrus cycle std: standard deviation for an estrus cycle

Returns: the day when this estrus should occur

static determine_param_value(mean, std)

Determine parameter value distribution for lactation curve model parameters. Args:

mean: mean of the parameter value for l, m, n in wood’s model std: standard deviation of the parameter value for l, m, n in

wood’s model

Returns: a random value draw from distribution of parameters

determine_presynch_program_day(date)

Determine the presynch program start time when pass voluntary waiting period. Args:

date: the time presynch program start

Returns: day on which the presynch program starts

determine_tai_program_day(date)

Determine the program start time when pass voluntary waiting period. Args:

date: the time tai program start

doubleovsynch_update(sim_day)

Doubleovsynch protocol for presynch method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

ed_tai_update(sim_day)

Update ED-TAI method, perform estrus detection before the TAI program Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

ed_update(sim_day)

Estrus occur at estrus day, estrus detected with detection rate, service performed with service rate, conception succeed with conception rate Args:

sim_day: simulation day

g6g_update(sim_day)

g6g protocol for presynch method. Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

get_bw_change(CI)

life cycle psedocode @[A.1A.C.56/57/58] Calculates the body weight change for a cow.

Args:
CI: the calving interval used in the body weight

change calculation

Returns: the daily body weight change for a cow.

health_cull_update()

Update cows culled for health problem, first cull or not in this parity will be determined with parity specific culling rate, then a cull reason will be determined by random draw. Then a cull day will be identified by reverse a distribution for cases of this reason.

property is_close_up_dry

Check if the cow is in the close-up dry state.

Returns

bool

True if the cow is in the close-up dry state, False otherwise.

property is_dry

Check if the cow is in the dry state.

Returns

property is_far_off_dry

Check if the cow is in the far-off dry state.

Returns

bool

True if the cow is in the far-off dry state, False otherwise.

property is_lactating

Check if the cow is lactating.

Returns

bool

True if the cow is lactating, False otherwise.

property is_pregnant

Check if the cow is pregnant.

Returns

bool

True if the cow is pregnant, False otherwise.

later_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after first estrus.

milking_update(sim_day, calving_interval)

Update milking status for lactating cows. start at calving, daily milk production estimated by breed and parity specific lactation curves. TEMP: fat percent, FCM, body weight during lactation, and dry matter intake are coded here with equations with hard-coded parameters just for valid the simulation model indication of the place for future adjustment with ration formulation and economics calculation.

Returns:
estimated_daily_milk_produced: estimated daily milk production

from the lactation curve

fat_percent: calculated with days in milk, for temporary use daily_fat_correct_milk_production: calculated form estimated

milk production and fat percent, for temporary use

open(sim_day)

Assign breeding method for open cows after spot open at preg check three methods can be assigned: ED, TAI, ED-TAI Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

phosphorus_rqmts(DMI)

Calculates and sets the animal’s phosphorus requirement. Args:

DMI: the Dry Matter Intake (kg)

preg_update(sim_day)

Update AI for cows reach ai day, inseminate the cow with specific semen type. By comparing with conception rate, if conception success, gestation length determined for preg check 1, confirm the conception for preg check 2 and 3, confirm pregnancy,

there are chances of preg loss in each period of time between preg checks

Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

presynch_update(sim_day)

Presynch protocol for presynch method Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

restart_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after calving.

resynch_ed_tai(sim_day)

Using ED at the resynch period of ED-TAI. Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

return_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after estrus not detected or not serveded.

set_breed_index()

Sets the cow’s breed index for use in the lactation curve parameter calculation

set_lactation_curve_params()

Sets cow’s lactation curve parameters based on cow’s lactation curve attribute. Currently only set up for wood model.

set_nutrient_rqmts(animal_grouping_scenario, nutrient_conc: dict = {})

Calculates this Cow’s nutrient requirements.

set_parity_index()

Sets the cow’s parity index for use in the lactation curve parameter calculation

tai_program_day_after_preg_check(sim_day)
Description:

resynch start after calving, resynch method assigned

Args:

sim_day: simulation day

tai_update(sim_day)

Assign tai and presynch method, update time AI method status, TAI can be performed with or without presynch. Args:

sim_day: the simulation day

update(sim_day, calving_interval)

Update cow status from the moment of calving, parity+1, milking start, pregnancy stop, and estrus restart.

Args:

sim_day: simulation day calving_interval: the calving interval used for the daily update

Returns:
estimated_daily_milk_produced: estimated daily milk production

from the lactation curve

fat_percent: calculated with days in milk, for temporary use daily_fat_correct_milk_production: calculated form estimated milk

production and fat percent, for temporary use

cull_stage: True if a cow is culled, false if it stays in the herd new_born: True if a calf is born

update_milk_production_history(sim_day)

Updates the animal’s milk production history by appending a MilkProductionHistory object to the list.

If milk production history has already been updated for the day, the most recent entry is deleted before appending the latest values. Once a cow reaches 305 days in milk, latest_milk_production_305days is updated.

Parameter

sim_day: simulation day

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.cow.MilkProductionHistory(sim_day, days_in_milk, milk_prod, days_born)

Bases: object

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.cow.random() → x in the interval [0, 1).

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferI module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferI.HeiferI(args)

Bases: Calf

calc_manure_excretion(feed, methane_model)

Calculates and sets the manure excretion components.

Args:

feed: instance of the Feed class methane_model: methane model used for methane emission calculations

get_heiferI_values()

Get current information from the heiferI

get_non_preg_bw_change()

Calculates the body weight change for a heifer that is not pregnant. If the days_born of the animal is equal to 400, the difference is set to 1 (otherwise results in a division by 0 error).

Returns: the daily body weight change for a heifer that is not pregnant

phosphorus_rqmts(DMI)

Calculates and sets the animal’s phosphorus requirement.

Args:

DMI: the Dry Matter Intake (kg)

set_nutrient_rqmts(temp, animal_grouping_scenario, nutrient_conc: dict = {}, metabolizable_energy: float = 15.625, previous_DMI: float = 10.0)

Calculates this heiferI’s nutrient requirements.

update(sim_day)

Controls heifer’s grow with average daily gain based on non-preg ADG based on NRC. Here is the place to change growth rate with heifer feeding methods later when we have heifer nutrition from the ration furmulation module. Once reach the breeding start day, this heifer would be move to next stage, the heiferII stage

Returns

the second stage of heifer – breeding stage starts

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferII module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferII.HeiferII(args)

Bases: HeiferI

CP_update(sim_day)

CP protocol for synch ed method estrus detection happens when estrus occur

P2_update(sim_day)

2P protocol for synch ed method estrus detection happens when estrus occur

after_abortion_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after abortion at preg check

after_ai_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after AI

assign_heiferII_values(args)

Assign the repro program with given vales

calc_manure_excretion(feed, methane_model)

Calculates and sets the manure excretion components.

Args:

feed: instance of the Feed class methane_model: methane model used for methane emission calculations

determine_estrus_day(start_date, estrus_note, sim_day)

In estrus detection program, determine estrus day and estrus note

Args:
start_date: start day of a estrus cycle, 1st day when breeding start

or last estrus happened or return estrus from preg loss

estrus_note: note of this estrus

Returns: the day when this estrus should occur

determine_synch_ed_estrus_day(date, avg, std, max_val)

Determine synch ed leading estrus start day, with normal distribution

Args:

date: start of the synch ed day avg: average of estrus occur after synch ed std: standard deviation of synch ed max_val: max value can go for the normal distribution,

avoiding negative value

determine_synch_ed_program_day(date)

Determine the program start time when reach breeding start time

Args:

date: the time breeding program start

determine_tai_program_day(date)

Determine the program start time when reach breeding start time

Args:

date: the time breeding program start

ed_update(sim_day)

Estrus occur at estrus day, estrus detected with detection rate, service preformed with service rate, conception successed with conception rate

get_bw_change()

Calculates the body weight change for a heifer, depending on if she is pregnant or not. If the gestation_length of the animal is equal to its days_in_preg, the difference is set to 1 (otherwise results in a division by 0 error).

Returns: the daily body weight change for a heifer

get_heiferII_values()

Get current information from the heiferII

init_values(args)

Initialize repro program values

md5CG2P_update(sim_day)

md5CG2P protocol for tai method

md5CGP_update(sim_day)

md5CGP protocol for tai method

open(sim_day)

Assign breeding method for open heifers after spot open at preg check three methods can be assigned: ED, TAI, synch-ED

phosphorus_rqmts(DMI)

Calculates and sets the animal’s phosphorus requirement.

Args:

DMI: the Dry Matter Intake (kg)

preg_update(sim_day)
update AI for heifers reach ai day, inseminate the heifer with specific

semen type

by comparing with conception rate, if conception success, gestation

length determined

for preg check 1, confirm the conception for preg check 2 and 3, confirm pregnancy, there are chances of preg

loss in each period of time between preg checks

return_estrus(sim_day)

Return estrus after estrus not detected or not serviced

set_nutrient_rqmts(temp, animal_grouping_scenario, nutrient_conc: dict = {}, metabolizable_energy: float = 15.625, previous_DMI: float = 10.0)

Calculates this heiferII’s nutrient requirements.

synch_ed_program_day_after_abortion()

Return to synch ed after abortion when spot at the preg check

synch_ed_update(sim_day)

Synch ed method update, assign with protocols: 2P or CP

tai_program_day_after_abortion()

Determine the TAI restart date after abortion preg checks

tai_update(sim_day)

Tai method update, assign tai method

update(sim_day)

Controls heifer’s grow with average daily gain based on user’s input until breeding start day. Here is the place to change growth rate with heifer feeding methods later when we have heifer nutrition from the ration formulation module. Breeding starts with assigned reproduction program. Time to move to the 3rd stage – replacement stage determined based on gestion length and user input of replacement time. Culling for reproduction problem occur when heifer doesn’t get pregnant for a long time.

Returns:

cull_stage: culling for reproduction failure third_stage: move to next stage – heiferIII stage when time comes

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferII.random() → x in the interval [0, 1).

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferIII module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.heiferIII.HeiferIII(args)

Bases: HeiferII

calc_manure_excretion(feed, methane_model)

Calculates and sets the manure excretion components.

Args:

feed: instance of the Feed class methane_model: methane model used for methane emission calculations

get_heiferIII_values()

Get current information from the heiferIII

set_nutrient_rqmts(temp, animal_grouping_scenario, nutrient_conc: dict = {}, metabolizable_energy: float = 15.625, previous_DMI: float = 10.0)

Calculates this heiferIII’s nutrient requirements.

update(sim_day)

Controls heifer’s grow with average daily gain based on user’s input until breeding start day here is the place to change growth rate with heifer feeding methods later when we have heifer nutrition from the ration formulation module next to it could build the function of ranking heifers.

Returns: cow_stage - heifer close to calving, move to cow stage

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.life_cycle module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.life_cycle.LifeCycleManager(data: AnimalConfigTypedDict)

Bases: object

Manages the life cycles of the animals.

daily_update(sim_day: int, calves: List[Calf], heiferIs: List[HeiferI], heiferIIs: List[HeiferII], heiferIIIs: List[HeiferIII], cows: List[Cow]) → Tuple[List[Cow], List[Cow], List[Calf], List[Calf], List[HeiferI], List[HeiferII], List[HeiferIII], List[Cow]]

Updates the status of the animals.

Args:

cows: list of Cow objects to be updated heiferIIIs: list of HeiferIII objects to be updated heiferIIs: list of HeiferII objects to be updated heiferIs: list of HeiferI objects to be updated calves: list of Calf objects to be updated sim_day: day number

Returns:

animals_added: list of animals added from replacement herd animals_removed: list of animals that were removed during this day calves_born: list of calves that were born during this day calves: updated list of calves heiferIs: updated list of heiferIs heiferIIs: updated list of heiferIIs heiferIIIs: updated list of heiferIIIs cows: updated list of cows

initialize_herd(config, herd_data: HerdInfoTypedDict) → Tuple[List[Calf], List[HeiferI], List[HeiferII], List[HeiferIII], List[Cow]]

Generates a replacement herd to simulate the market, for the herd to get replacements.

Parameters

config

stores (among other things) information on whether the seed has been set by the user

herd_dataHerdInfoTypedDict

The data for the herd to be initialized

Returns

Tuple[List[Calf], List[HeiferI], List[HeiferII], List[HeiferIII], List[Cow]]

A tuple of animal lists for the calves, heiferIs, heiferIIs, heiferIIIs, and cows

RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.pen_history module

class RUFAS.routines.animal.life_cycle.pen_history.PenHistory(start: int, end: int, pen, classes_in_pen: list[str])

Bases: object

A class to represent the history of a pen on a farm.

This class tracks the usage of a pen including the start and end dates, the specific pen, and the classes of animals that have been in the pen.

Attributes

start_dateint

The start date of the pen’s usage.

end_dateint

The end date of the pen’s usage.

penobject

The specific pen object

classes_in_penlist[str]

The classes of animals that have been in the pen.

Methods

None.

Module contents
